whatIs.question: What is VisionFrame?
whatIs.answer: VisionFrame is an AI-powered video generation platform that allows you to create stunning videos from text descriptions or images. No video editing skills required - simply describe your idea, and our AI creates professional videos in minutes.

howToStart.question: How do I start using VisionFrame?
howToStart.answer: Getting started is easy: 1) Sign up for a free account, 2) Receive 50 free credits to try, 3) Choose Text-to-Video or Image-to-Video, 4) Enter your description or upload an image, 5) Wait 3-5 minutes for generation, 6) Download and share your video!

aiModels.question: Which AI models do you use?
aiModels.answer: We integrate with the most advanced AI video generation models: Sora 2 (OpenAI), Veo 3.1 (Google), Wan 2.6 (Alibaba), and Seedance 1.5 Pro (ByteDance). We continuously update to the latest models for best quality.

pricing.question: How does pricing work?
pricing.answer: We use a simple credit system. New users get 50 free credits. After that, purchase credit packages or subscribe to a plan. Credits are consumed when generating videos (typically 10-60 credits per video depending on length and quality). No automatic charges unless you subscribe.

generationTime.question: How long does video generation take?
generationTime.answer: Most videos are generated in 3-5 minutes. Actual time varies based on video duration (5-15 seconds), resolution (480p-1080p), and current queue. Longer videos and higher quality may take more time.

commercialUse.question: Can I use videos commercially?
commercialUse.answer: Yes, commercial use is allowed on certain plans. You own the videos you generate, but you must ensure you have rights to any uploaded materials. Check your plan details for specific commercial use permissions.

quality.question: What video quality can I expect?
quality.answer: We support 720p, 1080p, and 4K resolutions. Quality varies based on prompt clarity, reference images, and AI model capabilities. We recommend reviewing generated content before commercial use.

prohibited.question: What content is prohibited?
prohibited.answer: We strictly prohibit generating content involving violence, pornography, hate speech, illegal activities, or infringement of others' rights. Violations result in immediate account termination.

refunds.question: What is your refund policy?
refunds.answer: Unused credit packages can be refunded within 7 days of purchase. Subscriptions can be cancelled within 7 days for a full refund. Technical issues that prevent service use are eligible for compensation or refunds.

support.question: How can I get support?
support.answer: Contact us at contact@visionaryframe.com for any questions. We typically respond within 1 business day. Premium plans include priority support.

subscriptionDetails.cancellation: Cancel anytime from account settings, no fees
subscriptionDetails.creditsExpire: Credits expire 365 days (one-time) or reset monthly (subscriptions)
subscriptionDetails.transferability: Credits cannot be transferred between accounts
subscriptionDetails.priceAdjustments: Prices may change with 30-day notice; your price is locked for current billing period

LandingFAQ.title: Frequently Asked Questions
LandingFAQ.subtitle: Quick answers to common questions about VisionFrame

whatIs.question: What is VisionFrame?
whatIs.answer: VisionFrame is an AI video generation platform that allows you to generate high-quality videos in 3-5 minutes by simply entering text descriptions or uploading images. No video production experience required. Actual generation time varies based on complexity and queue.

models.question: Which AI models are supported?
models.answer: We support the most advanced AI video generation models in the industry, including Sora 2, Veo 3.1, Wan 2.6, Seedance 1.5 Pro, and more. We continuously update to the latest models.

generationTime.question: How long does it take to generate a video?
generationTime.answer: Typically 3-5 minutes for completion. Actual time varies based on video duration, complexity, and current queue. Longer videos or higher quality may take more time.

pricing.question: How does pricing work?
pricing.answer: We use a credit-based system. New users receive 50 free credits to try. After using your free credits, you can purchase credit packages or subscribe to a plan. Your service will be paused if you run out of credits - no automatic charges unless you explicitly subscribe.

quality.question: What is the video quality?
quality.answer: We support multiple resolutions including 720p, 1080p, and 4K output. The quality is suitable for social media, marketing, and other professional scenarios. Results vary based on prompt quality and reference materials.

experience.question: Do I need professional video production experience?
experience.answer: Not at all! Simply describe the video content you want, and AI will automatically handle all the production work. Beginners can easily get started. Final quality varies based on prompt clarity and reference materials.

prohibited.question: What content is prohibited?
prohibited.answer: We strictly prohibit generating content involving violence, pornography, hate speech, illegal activities, or infringement of others' copyright/portrait rights. Violations will result in account termination.

responsibility.question: Who is responsible for generated content?
responsibility.answer: Users are fully responsible for all content they generate. We provide moderation and reporting channels at contact@visionaryframe.com. Ensure you have proper rights for uploaded materials and generated content.

privacy.question: How is my data handled?
privacy.answer: Your uploaded images/videos/text are stored securely and are never used for model training or internal optimization. You can delete your content at any time. Upon account deletion, all your data is permanently removed within 30 days. See our Privacy Policy for details.

commercial.question: Can I use generated videos commercially?
commercial.answer: Yes, for certain plans. Users must ensure they have appropriate rights to uploaded materials and generated content. Commercial use rights vary by plan - check your plan details. You are responsible for ensuring compliance with applicable laws.
